chapter_title.en: Chapter 75 – Making up the Night Prayer

text: 1433 - وَ سَأَلَهُ حَمَّادُ بْنُ عُثْمَانَ فَقَالَ لَهُ: أُصْبِحُ عَنِ اَلْوَتْرِ إِلَى اَللَّيْلِ فَكَيْفَ أَقْضِي فَقَالَ «مِثْلاً بِمِثْلٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1433 - Hammad ibn Uthman asked Imam (as) and said:
"I wake up after missing the Witr until the night. How do I make it up?"
Imam (as) said: "Like for like."
